'''havacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:igqirha|igqirha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:igqirha|igqirha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| havacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hævæchæth|hævæchæth]] || [[word:hævæchæj|hævæchæj]] || [[word:hævæchæsh|hævæchæsh]] || [[word:hævæchæ|hævæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:havavachath|havavachath]] || [[word:havavachaj|havavachaj]] || [[word:havavachash|havavachash]] || [[word:havavacha|havavacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:havachath|havachath]] || [[word:havachaj|havachaj]] || [[word:havachash|havachash]] || [[word:havacha|havacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:havafchath|havafchath]] || [[word:havafchaj|havafchaj]] || [[word:havafchash|havafchash]] || [[word:havafchaf|havafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:havachatha|havachatha]] || [[word:havachaja|havachaja]] || [[word:havachasha|havachasha]] || [[word:havachaka|havachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:havachath|havachath]] || [[word:havachaj|havachaj]] || [[word:havachash|havachash]] || [[word:havacha|havacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:havachathal|havachathal]] || [[word:havachajal|havachajal]] || [[word:havachashal|havachashal]] || [[word:havachakal|havachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:havachathatha|havachathatha]] || [[word:havachajaja|havachajaja]] || [[word:havachashasha|havachashasha]] || [[word:havachaka|havachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:havachathan|havachathan]] || [[word:havachajan|havachajan]] || [[word:havachashan|havachashan]] || [[word:havachakan|havachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:havachathaoro|havachathaoro]] || [[word:havachajaoro|havachajaoro]] || [[word:havachashaoro|havachashaoro]] || [[word:havachakaoro|havachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
